mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pa_mst_property WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND code = #{code} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pa_mst_property (company_id, code, name, description, property_type, region, address_line1, city, emirate, country, ownership_type, owner_name, onboarding_status, active_status, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{companyId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{propertyType}, #{region}, #{addressLine1}, #{city}, #{emirate}, #{country}, #{ownershipType}, #{ownerName}, #{onboardingStatus}, #{activeStatus}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update: UPDATE pa_mst_property SET company_id = #{companyId}, code = #{code}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, property_type = #{propertyType}, region = #{region}, address_line1 = #{addressLine1}, city = #{city}, emirate = #{emirate}, country = #{country}, ownership_type = #{ownershipType}, owner_name = #{ownerName}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_on = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND active_status = 'Y'

UPDATE pa_mst_property SET title_deed_no = #{titleDeedNo}, rera_permit_no = #{reraPermitNo}, document_reference = #{documentReference}, document_status = #{documentStatus}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_on = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND active_status = 'Y'

UPDATE pa_mst_property SET built_up_area = #{builtUpArea}, plot_area = #{plotArea}, market_value = #{marketValue}, annual_service_charge = #{annualServiceCharge}, operating_model = #{operatingModel}, facility_manager = #{facilityManager}, onboarding_status = COALESCE(#{onboardingStatus}, onboarding_status), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_on = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND active_status = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pa_mst_property_ownership WHERE property_id = #{propertyId} AND status != 'INACTIVE' ORDER BY sort_order, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pa_mst_property_ownership (id, property_id, party, role, share_right, reference, status, sort_order, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{id}, #{propertyId}, #{party}, #{role}, #{shareRight}, #{reference}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE party = VALUES(party), role = VALUES(role), share_right = VALUES(share_right), reference = VALUES(reference), status = VALUES(status), sort_order = VALUES(sort_order), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by), updated_on = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pa_mst_property_document WHERE property_id = #{propertyId} AND status != 'INACTIVE' ORDER BY sort_order, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pa_mst_property_document (id, property_id, document, category, reference, updated_date, status, sort_order, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{id}, #{propertyId}, #{document}, #{category}, #{reference}, #{updatedDate}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE document = VALUES(document), category = VALUES(category), reference = VALUES(reference), updated_date = VALUES(updated_date), status = VALUES(status), sort_order = VALUES(sort_order), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by), updated_on = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.select: SELECT id, company_id, NULL property_id, code, name, description, parent_id, sort_order, attributes, NULL status, active_status, updated_by, updated_on FROM pa_mst_block WHERE parent_id = #{propertyId} AND active_status = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_order, name

SELECT id, company_id, NULL property_id, code, name, description, parent_id, sort_order, attributes, NULL status, active_status, updated_by, updated_on FROM pa_mst_floor WHERE parent_id = #{blockId} AND active_status = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_order, name
SELECT * FROM pa_mst_unit WHERE parent_id = #{floorId} AND active_status = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_order, name

SELECT id, company_id, property_id, code, name, description, parent_id, sort_order, attributes, status, active_status, updated_by, updated_on FROM pa_mst_unit WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND active_status = 'Y' ORDER BY property_name, sort_order, name

SELECT id, company_id, NULL property_id, code, name, description, parent_id, sort_order, attributes, NULL status, active_status, updated_by, updated_on FROM pa_mst_amenity WHERE parent_id = #{propertyId} AND active_status = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_order, name
mapper.sql: (company_id, code, name, description, parent_id, sort_order, attributes, active_status, created_by, updated_by)

code = #{code}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, attributes = #{attributes}, active_status = #{activeStatus}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_on = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pa_mst_block VALUES SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update: UPDATE pa_mst_block SET WHERE id = #{id} AND active_status = 'Y'
UPDATE pa_mst_block SET active_status = 'N', active_to = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_on = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND active_status = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pa_mst_floor VALUES SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update: UPDATE pa_mst_floor SET WHERE id = #{id} AND active_status = 'Y'
UPDATE pa_mst_floor SET active_status = 'N', active_to = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_on = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND active_status = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pa_mst_unit (company_id, property_id, property_name, unit_code, unit_type, code, name, description, parent_id, sort_order, attributes, active_status, status, created_by, updated_by) SELECT #{companyId}, p.id, p.name, #{code}, #{name}, #{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder}, #{attributes}, #{activeStatus}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'VACANT'), #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} FROM pa_mst_floor f JOIN pa_mst_block b ON b.id = f.parent_id JOIN pa_mst_property p ON p.id = b.parent_id WHERE f.id = #{parentId} SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update: UPDATE pa_mst_unit SET , unit_code = #{code}, unit_type = #{name}, status = COALESCE(#{status}, status) WHERE id = #{id} AND active_status = 'Y'
UPDATE pa_mst_unit SET active_status = 'N', active_to = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, status = 'INACTIVE', updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_on = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND active_status = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pa_mst_amenity VALUES SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update: UPDATE pa_mst_amenity SET WHERE id = #{id} AND active_status = 'Y'
UPDATE pa_mst_amenity SET active_status = 'N', active_to = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_on = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND active_status = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT id, property_id propertyId, step_code stepCode, step_name stepName, owner_name ownerName, progress_percent progressPercent, state, sort_order sortOrder, updated_by updatedBy, updated_on updatedOn FROM pa_txn_property_workflow WHERE property_id = #{propertyId} ORDER BY sort_order, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pa_txn_property_workflow (property_id, step_code, step_name, owner_name, progress_percent, state, sort_order, updated_by) VALUES (#{propertyId}, #{stepCode}, #{stepName}, #{ownerName}, #{progressPercent}, #{state}, #{sortOrder}, #{updatedBy}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE step_name = VALUES(step_name), owner_name = VALUES(owner_name), progress_percent = VALUES(progress_percent), state = VALUES(state), sort_order = VALUES(sort_order), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by), updated_on = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.select: SELECT id, 'PROPERTY' type, code, name, onboarding_status status, NULL parent_id FROM pa_mst_property WHERE id = #{propertyId}
SELECT id, 'BLOCK' type, code, name, active_status status, parent_id FROM pa_mst_block WHERE parent_id = #{propertyId} AND active_status = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_order, name

SELECT f.id, 'FLOOR' type, f.code, f.name, f.active_status status, f.parent_id FROM pa_mst_floor f JOIN pa_mst_block b ON b.id = f.parent_id WHERE b.parent_id = #{propertyId} AND f.active_status = 'Y' ORDER BY f.sort_order, f.name

SELECT u.id, 'UNIT' type, u.code, u.name, u.status, u.parent_id FROM pa_mst_unit u JOIN pa_mst_floor f ON f.id = u.parent_id JOIN pa_mst_block b ON b.id = f.parent_id WHERE b.parent_id = #{propertyId} AND u.active_status = 'Y' ORDER BY u.sort_order, u.name

SELECT #{propertyId} propertyId, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pa_mst_block WHERE parent_id = #{propertyId} AND active_status = 'Y') blockCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pa_mst_floor f JOIN pa_mst_block b ON b.id = f.parent_id WHERE b.parent_id = #{propertyId} AND f.active_status = 'Y') floorCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pa_mst_unit u JOIN pa_mst_floor f ON f.id = u.parent_id JOIN pa_mst_block b ON b.id = f.parent_id WHERE b.parent_id = #{propertyId} AND u.active_status = 'Y') unitCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pa_mst_unit u JOIN pa_mst_floor f ON f.id = u.parent_id JOIN pa_mst_block b ON b.id = f.parent_id WHERE b.parent_id = #{propertyId} AND u.status = 'OCCUPIED' AND u.active_status = 'Y') occupiedUnits, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pa_mst_unit u JOIN pa_mst_floor f ON f.id = u.parent_id JOIN pa_mst_block b ON b.id = f.parent_id WHERE b.parent_id = #{propertyId} AND u.status IN ('VACANT','AVAILABLE') AND u.active_status = 'Y') vacantUnits, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pa_mst_unit u JOIN pa_mst_floor f ON f.id = u.parent_id JOIN pa_mst_block b ON b.id = f.parent_id WHERE b.parent_id = #{propertyId} AND u.status = 'RESERVED' AND u.active_status = 'Y') reservedUnits, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pa_mst_unit u JOIN pa_mst_floor f ON f.id = u.parent_id JOIN pa_mst_block b ON b.id = f.parent_id WHERE b.parent_id = #{propertyId} AND u.status = 'UNDER_MAINTENANCE' AND u.active_status = 'Y') maintenanceUnits, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pa_mst_amenity WHERE parent_id = #{propertyId} AND active_status = 'Y') amenityCount
